---
title: "Monitoring Applications"
---

---
title: "Monitoring Applications"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Automate-Administration/oyx1676037302743"
section: "Hyland Automate Administration"
---

You can monitor the health of your installation by using the Monitoring dashboard. There is a dashboard for each deployed application.

To access the dashboard:

1.  Log in to the Studio Admin App.
2.  Expand Devops from the left pane and select Application Instances.
3.  Click the three dots next to the application you want to monitor and select Monitoring.

You will see the Monitoring dashboard for the application.  ![](data:image/png;base64,)
- Services that are operational have a green dot.
- Services that are operational but may have some problems have a yellow dot.Note: Generally these problems are fixed automatically.
- Services that are not operating and require assistance have a red dot.
- Services that have an unknown state have a gray dot.

To gain more insight into a service, you can expand it to see more detailed information.
